job_description:
# EDI Data Analyst
Company: Computer Enterprises, Inc. (CEI), client Zelis Healthcare
Source: Dice and ZipRecruiter
Employment type: Contract W2
Checked: April 30, 2026
Posted: April 30, 2026 on Dice; ZipRecruiter corroborates current posting
URL: https://www.dice.com/job-detail/3119fa73-aeda-43c9-a5b9-a377402eaa24

## Highlights
- Remote EDI Data Analyst role with rare travel to Atlanta or New Jersey; EST/CST candidates considered.
- Healthcare data exchange role supporting Zelis Healthcare EDI systems.
- Requires EDI, SQL, ETL/data transformation support, validation/reconciliation, HIPAA, transaction sets such as 837/834/999/277, and AI-assisted monitoring or intelligent automation.
strengths: Strong match for healthcare EDI, SQL, validation, reconciliation, ETL support, HIPAA, and data quality.
AI-assisted monitoring language fits the prompt/AI-assisted analytics theme without requiring pure AI engineering.
Remote with EST/CST eligibility matches the current work-mode preference.
gaps: Specific EDI transaction sets and Zelis platform context should be presented only if supported by resume evidence.
Role may include rare travel and EST hours.
notes: Apply first. Tailor toward healthcare EDI/data exchange, SQL validation, reconciliation, HIPAA-aware data handling, ETL support, and AI-assisted monitoring as an adjacent improvement theme.
